'''Kriekaal''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kriekaal system/Legends|Kriekaal system]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Kriek]]s. Its continents were composed of hardened [[Duranium/Legends|duranium]] and its shallow [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of molten duranium.

In [[2,000,000 BBY]], an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] named [[Ssiskor]] came to Kriekaal, but perished in a catastrophe wrapped in legend of supernatural forces, which claim the oceans themselves destroyed him.

New continents were constantly forming on the planet. The continent [[Raltez]] finished its formation only by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The planet was later rediscovered by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
